ammo_workbench.ui.manual_p1: The ammunition workbench, by default, can print basic non-lethal ammunition (e.g. rubber bullets, IHDF).
ammo_workbench.ui.manual_p2: License modules can be purchased from Cargo or printed with sufficient research, enabling the printing of other ammunition variants, such as lethal, armor-piercing, or hollow-point ammunition. These modules are reusable and infinite-use, but many of their outputs require additional and/or exotic materials to print. Spend wisely!
ammo_workbench.ui.title: Ammunitions Workbench
